scripts.build:all: pwsh -Command "$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; Write-Host 'Limpando binário antigo...'; Remove-Item -Path '.\src-tauri\binaries\job-hunter-backend-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.exe' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Compilando backend com PyInstaller...'; Set-Location backend; pyinstaller --clean backend.spec; Copy-Item -Path '.\dist\job-hunter-backend.exe' -Destination '..\src-tauri\binaries\job-hunter-backend-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.exe'; Set-Location ..; Write-Host 'Iniciando Tauri build...'; pnpm tauri build"
